name: Abyss Actor - Hyper Director
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>劇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ハイパー・ディレクター
desc:
1 "Abyss Actor" Pendulum Monster
You can target 1 card in your Pendulum Zone; Special Summon it, then place 1 "Abyss Actor" Pendulum Monster with a different name, from your Deck or face-up Extra Deck, to your Pendulum Zone, also you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Abyss Actor" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Abyss Actor - Hyper Director" once per turn.

action: Places from Deck to Pendulum Zone
Places from Extra Deck to Pendulum Zone
summoning: Requires Pendulum Monsters as Link Materials
Special Summons from your Pendulum Zone
Restricts the player's Normal Summons to archetype specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
